roles.content: Theory of knowledge: A comprehensive examination of theory of knowledge within Logic & Epistemology, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
roles.source: British Journal for the Philosophy of Science

roles.content: Critical perspectives on theory of knowledge: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to theory of knowledge.
Recent developments in theory of knowledge: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of theory of knowledge in contemporary philosophy.
